channel.title: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.305.0.WPBCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China

Codename: popsicle

Version: OS3.0.305.0.WPBCNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.1 GB

MD5: c695abf5061833e474cc02ffc021a98f

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Standby power consumption in some scenarios
Optimization: Improved system performance and user experience
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Occasional display errors

Download: Here

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Standby power consumption in some scenarios
Optimization: Improved system performance and user experience
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Occasional display errors

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.306.0.WPBCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China

Codename: popsicle

Version: OS3.0.306.0.WPBCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.7 GB

MD5: 59bde8d0f990d4047fd9526b7bc78c2a

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Background service issues made devices reboot unexpectedly in some cases
[Rear display]
New: Weather, a new rear display wallpaper

Download: Here
